titleStmt.title: SII 37.431: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 431. (A.R. No. E 26 of 1941-42.) Amarāvati, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District.

summary.p: A sculptured marble in the Archaeological pavilion.
This is dated Śaka 1051, Saumya, Paushya, śu. 13, Wednesday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṅkrānti = 1129 A.D., December 25.

It records the construction of the temple of Ishṭakāmēśvara and the gift made to it of 55 sheep by Mahāpradhāna Daṇḍanāyaka Kāmana-Pergaḍa of Rāyūru in Kammanāṇḍu, who was a subordinate of Śrīvatsarāja; the gift was given by the donor for the merit of his parents.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmanmahā pradhānaṁ chāṇasave¨rggaḍe
manuve¨rggaḍe daṁdanāyakaṁ śrīvatsarā
jula tatpādapadmōpajīvitulaina kammanāṁ
ṭilōni rāyūri kāmana pe[¨r]ggaḍa śrāsa
kava¨rṣaṁbulu 1051 yagu saumyasaṁ
vatsara pauṣya śuddha trayōdaśi budhavāraṁbu
nuttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtti nimittamuna ta
mayettiṁccina guḍi śrīmadiṣṭa kāmī
śvara dēvaraku tamatallidaṁḍrulaku dha¨rmmā
¨rtthamugā Ācaṁdrā¨rkka tāramakhaṁḍava¨rtti
diviyakuṁ beṭṭina goṟiyalu 55
vīniṁjēkoni [A]marīśvaramuna kāpakaprōla
bōyini Ākabōyini vasamuna ciṁttana
bōyuṁḍu dama putrānu pautrikamu nitya
māneṁḍu neyivōyaṁggalavāru
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdhara saṣṭiṁ va
¨rṣa sahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
śrīdhānyala valavā
cā¨ryyāśca likhitaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 37.431 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
